title: Reuse-metrics tracking (downloads/queries)
context: Tracking reuse (downloads/queries) measures real outcomes delivered to beneficiaries rather than tasks merged. Only open / public-domain / openly-licensed sources (CIViC CC0, Open Targets CC0, Reactome, license-checked PMC open-access subset); COSMIC, OncoKB, DrugBank, any non-open DB and all controlled-access / patient-level data (dbGaP, EGA, biobanks, EHR) are out of scope and refused. No patient data; all therapeutic-target content is research evidence labeled 'not medical advice'. See PLAN.md.
objective: Set up privacy-preserving reuse-metrics tracking (downloads/queries) and document how the metrics are collected and reported.
acceptanceCriteria: Reuse metrics (downloads and/or queries) are tracked without collecting visitor PII.
Collection method and reporting cadence are documented.
output: A reuse-metrics tracking plan + lightweight instrumentation, committed via PR.
